user.title: Battery SOC Sensor
user.description: Select the sensor that reports your battery's state of charge (SOC). You can skip this and add it later via integration options if Modbus is not set up yet.

grid.title: Grid Connection Detection
grid.description: Select how power outages are detected. You can skip this step and configure it later via integration options.

voltage.title: Voltage Monitoring Sensors
voltage.description: Select the voltage sensors for each phase. A power outage is detected when all three phases drop below 50V.

thresholds.title: Battery Thresholds
thresholds.description: Configure when tier 2 devices should be turned off and restored based on battery SOC. You can adjust these later in the integration options.

notifications.title: Notification Services
notifications.description: Select which notification services should receive Battery Guard alerts. Persistent notifications are always enabled. You can change this later.

error.recovery_must_exceed_threshold: Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold

init.title: Battery Guard Settings
init.description: Configure sensors, thresholds, and notifications. Add sensors here once your PV system is integrated via Modbus. Changes will reload the integration.

error.recovery_must_exceed_threshold: Recovery threshold must be higher than shutdown threshold
